Based on my examination of the molecule from multiple angles, I have identified all the neighbor atoms of atom 22 (Carbon).

## Results for Atom 22 (C):

**Neighbor atoms covalently connected to C:22:**

| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 19 | N (Nitrogen) |
| 20 | C (Carbon) |
| 24 | C (Carbon) |
| 25 | C (Carbon) |

**Summary:** Atom 22 is a carbon atom with 4 neighbor atoms: one nitrogen (N:19) and three carbons (C:20, C:24, C:25).

**geomconf_index:** 8317

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 22, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
